productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Green Minnie Top With Pink Bow Kidswear
description: CompositionGreen top with pink and white polka dot piping along the neckline and sleeves and big bow below the collar in similar polka dots, mildly puffed sleeves and Minnie Mouse print on chestWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsA Minnie top with a twist, this green top from disney looks extremely stylish on little girls. The external bow in contrast pink and white on top of a Minnie graphic adds a 3D effect, making your little darling look all the more loveable. The cotton fabric will keep her dry and well ventilated while you can make her look all the more stylish by teaming this top with denim shorts or skirts and a pair of pretty footwear from crocs, which is now available at myntra. Add on some colourful jibbitz to these crocs sandals to transform your little girl into a princess.
